response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and agile methodologies. Crucially, his current role involves building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which perfectly aligns with the job's unique AI-native engineering mindset and technical strategy requirements. While he lacks the must-have Python experience, his extensive polyglot background (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Java) and deep systems architecture expertise make him a highly compelling candidate who should be interviewed.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Extensive Staff-level experience with a strong focus on technical strategy, software craftsmanship, and CI/CD.
concerns: Lacks the must-have strong Python programming experience emphasized in the job description.
Does not explicitly mention experience with out-of-hours on-call rotations or formal incident response management.
Historical tech stack relies heavily on Node.js and niche languages (DLang) rather than standard Python/ML ecosystems.
